prActivity.caveat: Counts are sourced from GitHub pull requests across discovered organization repos and attributed by the Jira-derived contributor-to-team map, falling back to committed repo-to-team mapping. Unmapped discovered repos only count when a mapped contributor authored the PR. Opened counts use non-draft PR createdAt, merged counts use mergedAt, sprint trend points render only closed sprints, and review-to-merge time uses the first submitted non-author GitHub review to mergedAt.
